input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.3.3
            TITLE: cell balancing is not permitted when the shutdown circuit is open ( ev.7.2, ev.8.4 )

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.3.3: Cell balancing is not permitted when the Shutdown Circuit is Open ( EV.7.2, EV.8.4 )
EV.7.3.3 Cell balancing is not permitted when the Shutdown Circuit is Open ( EV.7.2, EV.8.4 )

final_answer: Cell balancing is not permitted when the Shutdown Circuit is Open ( EV.7.2, EV.8.4 )
